message:
fix: apply all four filters in filterItems convenience method (#3352) (#3435)

filterItems only applied cluster and severity filters, silently ignoring
status and custom text filters. This caused a mismatch between the UI
filter controls and displayed data.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
